context: Tests whether the agent applies the 9-dimension framework correctly to a skill heavy with redundant content (SQL basics, installation steps, generic best-practices) and produces a scored report with actionable remediation.

checklist.name: 9-dimension framework applied
checklist.description: Uses all 9 dimensions: Knowledge Delta, Mindset+Procedures, Anti-Pattern Quality, Specification Compliance, Progressive Disclosure, Freedom Calibration, Pattern Recognition, Practical Usability, Eval Validation

checklist.name: Redundant content identified
checklist.description: Flags SQL basics, installation instructions, and generic best-practices as redundant content not worth expert attention

checklist.name: Knowledge Delta scored low
checklist.description: Assigns D1 a low score (<=10/20) reflecting the high redundancy ratio of the input skill

checklist.name: Numerical scores per dimension
checklist.description: Provides specific numerical scores for each dimension with a brief justification

checklist.name: A-grade threshold referenced
checklist.description: States the A-grade target as >=126/140 or equivalent percentage

checklist.name: Actionable remediation steps
checklist.description: Remediation plan contains specific file-level changes (what to add/remove/rewrite) with S/M/L effort sizing

checklist.name: Specification compliance issues noted
checklist.description: Identifies the weak description field ('Help with SQL queries.') as a D4 compliance failure

checklist.name: Progressive disclosure gap noted
checklist.description: Notes absence of references/ directory and/or content frontloading as a D5 weakness
